%% frontmatter/titlepage.tex
%% Cover: the ridgeline of spiked-model spectra above a formal type block,
%% with two small simulation vignettes at the foot. The background artwork
%% (figures/titlepage_background.pdf) is generated by
%% notebooks/06_titlepage_art.py; the type is overlaid via TikZ at
%% page-absolute positions matched to the artwork's clear bands.

\thispagestyle{empty}

\definecolor{coverInk}{HTML}{2D2D2D}
\definecolor{coverSlate}{HTML}{3A5A78}
\definecolor{coverGray}{HTML}{8B8378}

\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
  % full-bleed background artwork
  \node[anchor=center, inner sep=0pt] at (current page.center)
    {\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth, height=\paperheight]{figures/titlepage_background.pdf}};

  % ----- title block, centered in the clear middle of the page
  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-4.55in]current page.north)
    {\fontsize{21}{26}\selectfont\bfseries\textcolor{coverInk}{A STUDY OF RANDOM MATRICES}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.02in]current page.north)
    {\fontsize{13}{17}\selectfont\itshape\textcolor{coverSlate}{From Foundations to Spectral Clustering}};

  \draw[coverGray, line width=0.5pt]
    ([xshift=-1.05in, yshift=-5.34in]current page.north) --
    ([xshift=1.05in, yshift=-5.34in]current page.north);

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.68in]current page.north)
    {\large\textcolor{coverInk}{ARZAAN SINGH}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-5.98in]current page.north)
    {\small\textcolor{coverInk}{Under the supervision of Professor Gustavo Didier}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-6.34in]current page.north)
    {\small\itshape\textcolor{coverGray}{An Independent Study Report}};

  \node[anchor=center] at ([yshift=-6.62in]current page.north)
    {\small\textcolor{coverInk}{Department of Mathematics \,\(\cdot\)\, Tulane University \,\(\cdot\)\, June 2026}};

  % ----- one-line colophon at the foot, between the two vignettes
  \node[anchor=south] at ([yshift=0.30in]current page.south)
    {\fontsize{7}{9}\selectfont\textcolor{coverGray}{%
      Cover: simulations from this report, generated by \texttt{notebooks/06\_titlepage\_art.py}.}};
\end{tikzpicture}

\clearpage
